news.title:
Macquarie maintains Underperform rating for Aurobindo Pharma, target ₹1,050.
TheraNym expands biologics deal with Merck; payoff expected in 3–4 years.
news.summary:
Macquarie maintains Underperform rating for Aurobindo Pharma, target ₹1,050.
TheraNym expands biologics deal with Merck; payoff expected in 3–4 years.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's Rs 800-cr buyback at Rs 1,475/share ends today.
Investors must buy by April 16 before ex-record date tomorrow.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's Rs 800-cr buyback at Rs 1,475/share ends today.
Investors must buy by April 16 before ex-record date tomorrow.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's arm TheraNym expands MSD pact, to set up $150-175M Unit 2 facility.
Q3 FY26 profit rose 7.5% YoY to ₹909.8Cr; stock gained 2.6%, closing at ₹1,375 on April 15.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's arm TheraNym expands MSD pact, to set up $150-175M Unit 2 facility.
Q3 FY26 profit rose 7.5% YoY to ₹909.8Cr; stock gained 2.6%, closing at ₹1,375 on April 15.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary signs product schedule with MSD Singapore.
Plans $150-175M drug substance facility with 60,000L bioreactor.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary signs product schedule with MSD Singapore.
Plans $150-175M drug substance facility with 60,000L bioreactor.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary TheraNym expands CMO deal with Merck to build a 60KL bioreactor facility.
TheraNym invests $150-$175M in greenfield project for mammalian Drug Substance production.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's subsidiary TheraNym expands CMO deal with Merck to build a 60KL bioreactor facility.
TheraNym invests $150-$175M in greenfield project for mammalian Drug Substance production.

news.title:
ICICI Securities forecasts tepid Q4 FY26 pharma sector revenue growth of 7.2% YoY with EBITDA, PAT declining.
Top picks: Sun Pharma, Aurobindo, Alkem, Gland; Torrent, Alkem to gain from domestic focus, Lupin shows resilience.
news.summary:
ICICI Securities forecasts tepid Q4 FY26 pharma sector revenue growth of 7.2% YoY with EBITDA, PAT declining.
Top picks: Sun Pharma, Aurobindo, Alkem, Gland; Torrent, Alkem to gain from domestic focus, Lupin shows resilience.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance among firms trading ex-dividend this week.
Corporate actions include dividends, stock splits, income distributions, and buybacks.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance among firms trading ex-dividend this week.
Corporate actions include dividends, stock splits, income distributions, and buybacks.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance, Pashupati Cotspin, and Prima Plastics announce key corporate actions, including buybacks, dividends, stock splits, and spinoffs.
Aurobindo Pharma's ₹800 Cr buyback, Muthoot's interim dividend, Pashupati's 1:10 stock split, and Prima's spinoff aim to enhance shareholder value and liquidity.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma, Muthoot Finance, Pashupati Cotspin, and Prima Plastics announce key corporate actions, including buybacks, dividends, stock splits, and spinoffs.
Aurobindo Pharma's ₹800 Cr buyback, Muthoot's interim dividend, Pashupati's 1:10 stock split, and Prima's spinoff aim to enhance shareholder value and liquidity.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma hits 52-week high in April; rally may continue.
Short-term traders may consider buying the stock based on chart patterns.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma hits 52-week high in April; rally may continue.
Short-term traders may consider buying the stock based on chart patterns.

news.title:
Asian markets surged up to 5% after a 15-day ceasefire between Iran and the US; Gift Nifty jumped 700 points.
Infosys, GAIL, and Aurobindo Pharma among stocks in focus; oil prices plunged ~14% amid eased geopolitical risks.
news.summary:
Asian markets surged up to 5% after a 15-day ceasefire between Iran and the US; Gift Nifty jumped 700 points.
Infosys, GAIL, and Aurobindo Pharma among stocks in focus; oil prices plunged ~14% amid eased geopolitical risks.

news.title:
Titagarh Naval Systems gets In-Principle Approval for shipbuilding expansion; IRFC sanctions Rs 1,000 crore loan to MAHAGENCO.
Aurobindo Pharma reports positive Phase 3 trial results; Deep Industries wins ONGC contract worth Rs 59 crore.
news.summary:
Titagarh Naval Systems gets In-Principle Approval for shipbuilding expansion; IRFC sanctions Rs 1,000 crore loan to MAHAGENCO.
Aurobindo Pharma reports positive Phase 3 trial results; Deep Industries wins ONGC contract worth Rs 59 crore.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma gains USFDA approval for dapagliflozin tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg.
The company secures 180-day shared generic drug exclusivity for dapagliflozin.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma gains USFDA approval for dapagliflozin tablets, 5 mg and 10 mg.
The company secures 180-day shared generic drug exclusivity for dapagliflozin.

news.title:
Jubilant FoodWorks' Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY; Godrej Consumer expects double-digit sales growth.
IRFC disbursed Rs. 1,000 Cr loan; Aurobindo reported positive Phase 3 trial results for biosimilar BP11.
news.summary:
Jubilant FoodWorks' Q4FY26 revenue rose 19.1% YoY; Godrej Consumer expects double-digit sales growth.
IRFC disbursed Rs. 1,000 Cr loan; Aurobindo reported positive Phase 3 trial results for biosimilar BP11.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's CuraTeQ reports positive Phase 3 results for BP11 biosimilar.
BP11 showed comparability to Xolair; EMA and FDA submissions planned by Q2 2026.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's CuraTeQ reports positive Phase 3 results for BP11 biosimilar.
BP11 showed comparability to Xolair; EMA and FDA submissions planned by Q2 2026.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma's Curateq Biologics reported positive Phase 3 results for BP11.
Plans are underway for EMA and FDA filings for BP11 by Q2 2026.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma's Curateq Biologics reported positive Phase 3 results for BP11.
Plans are underway for EMA and FDA filings for BP11 by Q2 2026.

news.title:
Nifty Healthcare index dropped below 100-WMA to 13,790, down 8% from its peak due to US tariff concerns.
Sun Pharma faces potential FY28 earnings hit of 5%, while generics like Aurobindo, Cipla see relief but risk policy overhang.
news.summary:
Nifty Healthcare index dropped below 100-WMA to 13,790, down 8% from its peak due to US tariff concerns.
Sun Pharma faces potential FY28 earnings hit of 5%, while generics like Aurobindo, Cipla see relief but risk policy overhang.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma approves share buyback worth ₹800 crore with details on premium.
The company also announced the record date for the buyback.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma approves share buyback worth ₹800 crore with details on premium.
The company also announced the record date for the buyback.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma to transfer branded generics to Auropharm Ltd for Rs. 143.2 Cr.
The related-party transaction aims to streamline and boost domestic business growth.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma to transfer branded generics to Auropharm Ltd for Rs. 143.2 Cr.
The related-party transaction aims to streamline and boost domestic business growth.

news.title:
Aurobindo Pharma sets 17 Apr 2026 as record date for share buyback.
Eligible equity shareholders will be identified for participation in the buyback.
news.summary:
Aurobindo Pharma sets 17 Apr 2026 as record date for share buyback.
Eligible equity shareholders will be identified for participation in the buyback.

news.title:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.
news.summary:
Indian pharma stocks plunged as Trump administration considers 100% tariffs on certain medicines to reshore production.
Nifty Pharma fell 3.8%, with Biocon, Glenmark, Aurobindo, Sun Pharma, and Ipca Labs dropping over 4-5% amid tariff concerns.
